rationale: Acting on either yields essentially identical PR quality: Review 1's sole naming nit (misleading _sq/_of_exists on the non-sq lemma) and Review 2's (squareClass_ prefix with no defined object; algebraMap_eq_iff only one direction) are all real but minor stylistic preferences with no material impact on the shown diff or maintainability; the rfl lemmas are accurately named even if trivial. No finding rises to the level a maintainer would require changing.
